summary: Simulation History feature testing complete. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. Tested: GET /api/operator/simulations (paginated list with page, limit, run_type filter), GET /api/operator/simulations/{id} (detail with config_json + summary_json), POST simulation endpoints persist history atomically, immutability verified (PUT/DELETE/PATCH return 405), 404 for non-existent runs, RBAC (guardian gets 403). Frontend: History tab with 'SIMULATION HISTORY (Research Log)' label, table sorted by created_at DESC, click row opens right-side drawer with full JSON pretty view, filter dropdown (All Types/Single Device/Fleet), pagination controls.

issues: Missing DialogContent aria-describedby (accessibility warning in console, non-blocking)

backend.GET_simulations_filter_single: PASS - Filter by run_type=single works correctly
backend.GET_simulations_filter_fleet: PASS - Filter by run_type=fleet works correctly
backend.GET_simulations_sorted_desc: PASS - Results sorted by created_at DESC
backend.GET_simulations_detail: PASS - Returns full config_json and summary_json
backend.immutability_no_PUT: PASS - PUT returns 405 Method Not Allowed
backend.immutability_no_DELETE: PASS - DELETE returns 405 Method Not Allowed
backend.immutability_no_PATCH: PASS - PATCH returns 405 Method Not Allowed
backend.fleet_sim_persists_history: PASS - POST /simulate/fleet persists history with FULL raw summary (anomaly_distribution, per_device_results, etc.)

frontend.history_description: PASS - 'Immutable audit trail of all simulation experiments' subtitle
frontend.filter_dropdown: PASS - Filter dropdown with All Types, Single Device, Fleet options
frontend.table_display: PASS - Table shows RUN ID, TYPE, DEVICES, ANOMALIES, DB WRITES, EXECUTED BY, DATE columns
frontend.table_sorted_desc: PASS - Rows sorted by date DESC (newest first)
frontend.row_click_opens_drawer: PASS - Clicking row opens right-side Sheet/drawer
frontend.drawer_run_id: PASS - Drawer shows simulation_run_id with badge
frontend.drawer_metadata: PASS - Shows Devices, Anomalies, DB Writes, Scheduler, Executed By, Date
frontend.drawer_config_json: PASS - CONFIGURATION section with JSON pretty view
frontend.drawer_summary_json: PASS - FULL SUMMARY section with JSON pretty view
frontend.pagination_controls: PASS - Previous/Next page buttons and 'Page X of Y' text

critical_code_review_comments: Fleet persistence is atomic - single transaction for telemetry + evaluation + history record
Full raw summary stored: anomaly_distribution, per_device_results, metric_patterns, gap_patterns, combined scores, is_simulated flags
Pagination correctly returns {items, total_count, page, limit}
Immutability enforced - no PUT/DELETE/PATCH endpoints exist (405 returned)
History tab UI follows design: 'SIMULATION HISTORY (Research Log)' label, right-side drawer with JSON pretty view
Minor accessibility warning: Missing aria-describedby in DialogContent (non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: Created 2 additional simulation runs during pytest tests (1 single, 1 fleet) to verify persistence
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simulation History feature fully tested and working. Backend: 13 pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_simulation_history.py covering list, detail, filter, pagination, immutability, atomic persistence, and RBAC. Frontend: All UI elements working - History tab, filter dropdown, paginated table, drawer with JSON pretty view. 4+ simulation runs exist in DB for testing. No console errors (only accessibility warning for DialogContent aria-describedby).
